goal: 发布 Sherlog 0.3.12 并更新本机 shlog

summary.title: Release Sherlog 0.3.12 version bump
summary.what: Bumped @act0r/sherlog from 0.3.11 to 0.3.12 in package.json and package-lock.json as the release commit for the status coverage freshness performance fix.
summary.why: The user approved publishing the status performance fix and asked to update the local machine after release. A registry release needs a package version bump before pushing the tag that triggers the npm publication workflow.
summary.user_goal: 发布 Sherlog 0.3.12 并更新本机 shlog

decisions.rationale: The change preserves CLI output contracts and DB schema while improving status performance, so a patch release is appropriate.
rejected: Publish under 0.3.11 without a version bump
Use a minor release for a compatible performance fix

decisions.chose: Seal this release intent only against the version bump commit 57cd9e4, leaving the preceding status performance fix covered by int_19d3c24f.
decisions.rationale: This keeps Mainline commit coverage precise and avoids a release bookkeeping intent re-claiming the implementation diff.

review_notes: Validation before commit passed: npm run check (29 test files, 197 tests).
No push, tag, npm registry publication, or local installed CLI update had occurred at seal time; those are the next release steps.

migration_notes: No database migration is required for 0.3.12.
Existing user indexes will benefit after the published CLI is installed.
